name: bb_rsi_mean_reversion_xauusd_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside Bollinger Bands with extreme RSI(7) during active sessions and sufficient BB-width, price reverts to the middle band within 30 bars often enough to yield PF>=2.0.

signals.entry_long: close < lower_bb(20, 1.8) AND rsi(7) < 12 AND bb_width > bb_width_percentile(200, 30)
signals.entry_short: close > upper_bb(20, 1.8) AND rsi(7) > 88 AND bb_width > bb_width_percentile(200, 30)

exits.take_profit: opposite bollinger band (mean reversion) OR middle band fallback
exits.breakeven: move SL to entry after +1.0*ATR favorable move
